ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Capital Adequacy Ratio) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category the metric falls under (e.g., Liquidity, Profitability) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., %, $) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of metric updates (e.g., annually, quarterly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Branch or subsidiary associated with the metric */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the metric is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial metric being measured */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data represents */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the respective year */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Branch or subsidiary associated with the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., internal audit, external audit) */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the value is estimated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Liquidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the branch */,
  "parent_branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent branch (for hierarchical structures) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the branch is currently active */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the branch was established */,
  "last_audited_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_parent_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Branch or subsidiary the user is associated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the role is currently active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Branch or subsidiary associated with the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Branch or subsidiary associated with the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the report is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated financial metric */,
  "visual_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "visual_content" TEXT /* Content or configuration of the visualization */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Branch or subsidiary associated with the visualization */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the visualization is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Branch or subsidiary associated with the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)
